penalties.description: Video shows instructional demonstration of ligating loop technique rather than FLS task4 extracorporeal suturing performance

score_components.formula_applied: automatic zero due to auto-fail penalty

reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as an instructional video demonstrating ligating loop technique with German subtitles, not an actual FLS task4 performance. GPT-4o incorrectly scored it as a completed suturing task. The video content clearly shows loop manipulation around appendages rather than suture-through-targets and knot-tying sequence required for task4.
